specific_question: Can Elexion Automotive current manufacturing capacity support a shift to production for direct sales by Q1 2026?
answer: As of January 2025, Elexion Automotive headquarters has the capacity to support a shift to production for direct sales by Q1 2026 based on 2024 and 2025 internal business strategies reports.
dr_question: How will Elexion Automotive's adoption of a complete direct-to-customer sales model by 2026 affect sales cycle duration, conversion rates, and average revenue per customer across the United States with franchise laws?
